usage: report_timing [-help] [-analysis_summary_csv_extended_file <string>] [-analysis_summary_csv_file <string>] [-analysis_summary_file <string>] [-check_clocks] [-check_type {setup hold clock_gating_setup clock_gating_hold clock_gating_pulse_width data_setup data_hold recovery removal pulse_width clock_period clock_separation skew no_change_setup no_change_hold max_delay min_delay}] [-debug {unconstrained time_borrow cppr_point constraint_arc context wire_variation vt_skew}] [-delay_limit <float>] [-derate_summary] [-format <column_list>] [-gui] [-hpin] [-max_slack <float>] [-min_slack <float>] [-net] [-output_format {text csv gtd binary}] [-path_exceptions {applied ignored all}] [-path_group <groupname_list>] [-path_type {end summary full full_clock end_slack_only summary_slack_only}] [-retime {aocv path_slew_propagation aocv_path_slew_propagation}] [-retime_delaycal_pins <pin_name>] [-retime_format {manual retime_compare retime_replace}] [-retime_mode {path exhaustive}] [-skip_io_paths] [-through <object_list>] [-through_fall <object_list>] [-through_rise <object_list>] [-unique_pins] [-worst_rc_corner] [> <filename[.gz]>] [>> <filename[.gz]>] [-late | -early ] [-rise | -fall ] [-begin_end_pair | [[ -max_paths <integer>] [-nworst <integer>]]] [-unconstrained | -point_to_point ] [-collection | -machine_readable | -tcl_list ] [-not_through <object_list> | -not_rise_through <object_list> | -not_fall_through <object_list> ] [ [-from <object_list> | -from_rise <object_list> | -from_fall <object_list> ] [-clock_from <clk_signame_list> [-edge_from {lead trail}]] [-to <object_list> | -to_rise <object_list> | -to_fall <object_list> ] [-clock_to <clk_signame_list> [-edge_to {lead trail}]] ] [-view <viewName> ]

options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -analysis_summary_csv_extended_file
options.description: <string> Generate csv file to be used for merging

options.name: -analysis_summary_csv_file
options.description: Generates analysis summary csv file.

options.name: -analysis_summary_file
options.description: Generates analysis summary file.

options.name: -begin_end_pair
options.description: Reports all violating paths between unique source and target begin and end pins

options.name: -check_clocks
options.description: Generates reports based on timing paths on the clock network instead of the standard timing to data endpoints

options.name: -check_type
options.description: {setup hold clock_gating_setup clock_gating_hold clock_gating_pulse_width data_setup data_hold recovery removal pulse_width clock_period clock_separation skew no_change_setup no_change_hold max_delay min_delay} Reports only the paths that end at the specified timing check

options.name: -clock_from
options.description: Reports the paths going through specified launching clocks

options.name: -clock_to
options.description: Reports the paths going through specified capturing clocks

options.name: -collection
options.description: Returns a collection of timing paths

options.name: -debug
options.description: {unconstrained time_borrow cppr_point constraint_arc context wire_variation vt_skew} Used for debugging various features of the path

options.name: -delay_limit
options.description: path delay limit for unconstrained paths

options.name: -derate_summary
options.description: Generates an LOCV derating summary table for the launch and capture paths, in addition to the timing report

options.name: -early
options.description: Generates the timing report for early paths

options.name: -edge_from
options.description: Reports the paths going through specified edge of launching clocks

options.name: -edge_to
options.description: Reports the paths going through specified edge of capturing clocks

options.name: -fall
options.description: Reports the path with the falling edge on the endpoint

options.name: -format
options.description: Formats the report according to the column_list

options.name: -from
options.description: Reports the paths going through specified from pins, ports or cells

options.name: -from_fall
options.description: Reports the paths going through falling transition of specified from pins, ports or cells

options.name: -from_rise
options.description: Reports the paths going through rising transition of specified from pins, ports or cells

options.name: -gui
options.description: Presents report in GUI window

options.name: -hpin
options.description: Prints all hierarchical crossings of an arc under hpin column in report_timing table

options.name: -late
options.description: Generates the timing report for late paths

options.name: -machine_readable
options.description: Generates detailed timing report in machine-readable format

options.name: -max_paths
options.description: Reports the specified number of worst paths in the design, regardless of the endpoint

options.name: -max_slack
options.description: Reports only those paths with slack equal to or less than the value of float are reported

options.name: -min_slack
options.description: Reports only those paths whose slack is greater than the specified value

options.name: -net
options.description: Adds a row for the net arc

options.name: -not_fall_through
options.description: Reports paths that do not traverse through the falling transition of specified object list

options.name: -not_rise_through
options.description: Reports paths that do not traverse through the rising transition of specified object list

options.name: -not_through
options.description: Reports paths that do not traverse through the specified object list

options.name: -nworst
options.description: Specifies the number of paths to be enumerated for each endpoint

options.name: -output_format
options.description: Generates detailed timing report in different format.

options.name: -path_exceptions
options.description: Includes information of path exceptions applied and considered for the reported path

options.name: -path_group
options.description: Reports only paths contained in the groups specified in groupname_list

options.name: -path_type
options.description: {end summary full full_clock end_slack_only summary_slack_only} The path_type option lets you choose the format of the report by path type

options.name: -point_to_point
options.description: Traces the worst delay path between a pair of from-to pins

options.name: -retime
options.description: {aocv path_slew_propagation aocv_path_slew_propagation} Reanalyzes the specified set of paths using the specified method

options.name: -retime_delaycal_pins
options.description: Specifies the pin on which RDC for PBA is required

options.name: -retime_format
options.description: {manual retime_compare retime_replace} The retime format option lets you set the format of the report for retime related fields

options.name: -retime_mode
options.description: Reanalyzes the specified set of paths using the specified method

options.name: -rise
options.description: Reports the path with the rising edge on the endpoint

options.name: -skip_io_paths
options.description: Specifies whether I/O paths are to be ignored

options.name: -tcl_list
options.description: Produces the report in Tcl list format instead of a tabular format

options.name: -through
options.description: Reports the paths going through specified pins, ports, cells or nets

options.name: -through_fall
options.description: Reports the paths going through falling transition of specified pins, ports, cells or nets

options.name: -through_rise
options.description: Reports the paths going through rising transition of specified pins, ports, cells or nets

options.name: -to
options.description: Reports the paths going through specified to pins, ports or cells

options.name: -to_fall
options.description: Reports the paths going through falling transition of specified to pins, ports or cells

options.name: -to_rise
options.description: Reports the paths going through rising transition of specified to pins, ports or cells

options.name: -unconstrained
options.description: Reports only the unconstrained paths

options.name: -unique_pins
options.description: Reports paths through unique set of pins

options.name: -view
options.description: Generates a timing report for the specified analysis view only. By default all active views are analyzed

options.name: -worst_rc_corner
options.description: Identifies worst interconnect parameter combination that leads to minimum slack (desired) and generates a report for the corner (bool, optional) > <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file (redirect_operator, optional) >> <filename[.gz]> # Redirects output to specified file
